item.title: DeFi Daily Report 2026-03-23
item.description:
# DeFi Market Intelligence Report — 2026-03-23

| | Price | 24h Change |
|---|---:|---:|
| BTC | $67,968 | -1.58% |
| ETH | $2,057.62 | -1.61% |

**24h Volume:** $70.75B

| Protocol | TVL | 1d | 7d | Category |
